{"args":["_compiler_id_version_compute","\n/* __INTEL_LLVM_COMPILER = VVVVRP prior to 2021.2.0, VVVVRRPP for 2021.2.0 and\n * later. */\n#define DEC(n)                   \\\n  ('0' + (((n) / 10000000)%10)), \\\n  ('0' + (((n) / 1000000)%10)),  \\\n  ('0' + (((n) / 100000)%10)),   \\\n  ('0' + (((n) / 10000)%10)),    \\\n  ('0' + (((n) / 1000)%10)),     \\\n  ('0' + (((n) / 100)%10)),      \\\n  ('0' + (((n) / 10)%10)),       \\\n  ('0' +  ((n) % 10))\n\n/* Convert integer to hex digit literals.  */\n#define HEX(n)             \\\n  ('0' + ((n)>>28 & 0xF)), \\\n  ('0' + ((n)>>24 & 0xF)), \\\n  ('0' + ((n)>>20 & 0xF)), \\\n  ('0' + ((n)>>16 & 0xF)), \\\n  ('0' + ((n)>>12 & 0xF)), \\\n  ('0' + ((n)>>8  & 0xF)), \\\n  ('0' + ((n)>>4  & 0xF)), \\\n  ('0' + ((n)     & 0xF))\n\n/* Construct a string literal encoding the version number. */\n#ifdef COMPILER_VERSION\nchar const* info_version = \"INFO\" \":\"
